TypeError: character mapping must return integer, None or unicode
source_code:
# source: https://github.com/martomo/SublimeTextXdebug/issues/81
# repo: martomo/SublimeTextXdebug
# title: Issue TypeError: character mapping must return integer, None or unicode
# 
# Hi, when i debug, the context show nothing. This is my console:
# **And this my system info:**
# **And my configuration:**
# **xdebug.ini**
# **xdebug.log**
# ```
# Log opened at 2014-05-23 02:51:33
# I: Checking remote connect back address.
# I: Remote address found, connecting to 127.0.0.1:9000.
# E: Could not connect to client. :-(
# Log closed at 2014-05-23 02:51:33
# Log opened at 2014-05-23 02:51:39
# I: Checking remote connect back address.
# I: Remote address found, connecting to 127.0.0.1:9000.
# I: Connected to client. :-)
# -> <init xmlns="urn:debugger_protocol_v1" xmlns:xdebug="http://xdebug.org/dbgp/xdebug" fileuri="file:///home/quangminh/www/test.php" language="PHP" protocol_version="1.0" appid="14172" idekey="sublime.xdebug"><engine version="2.2.3"><![CDATA[Xdebug]]></engine><author><![CDAT

zend_extension=/usr/lib/php5/20121212/xdebug.so

xdebug.remote_enable = 1
xdebug.remote_port = 9000
xdebug.remote_handler = "dbgp"
xdebug.remote_mode = req
xdebug.remote_connect_back = 1
xdebug.remote_log = "/tmp/xdebug.log"
xdebug.max_nesting_level = 200
xdebug.profiler_enable_trigger = 1
xdebug.profiler_enable = 1
expected_fix_hint: Fix argument type/shape; check signature changes between library versions.
